originalTitle: Watch: At the scene where Bangkok's deadly bar fire unfolded
summary: The BBC’s South East Asia correspondent visits the site where at least 27 people were killed during a bar fire in Thailand.
content:
The BBC's South East Asia correspondent Jonathan Head has visited the site where at least 27 people were killed during a bar fire in Thailand.

The deadly blaze broke out at Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao – the local name of the bar – which is situated in the Chatuchak district of Bangkok.
chineseTitle: 观看：曼谷致命酒吧火灾现场
chineseSummary: BBC 东南亚记者探访了泰国酒吧火灾造成至少 27 人死亡的现场。
chineseContent:
BBC 东南亚记者乔纳森·海德 (Jonathan Head) 访问了泰国酒吧火灾造成至少 27 人死亡的现场。

位于曼谷乍都乍区的 Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao 酒吧（该酒吧的当地名称）发生了致命火灾。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
